documents.title: Email Verification for New Accounts
documents.content: New Telco accounts require email confirmation within 72 hours. Customers with unconfirmed email cannot send money or receive payments. Automated IVR can guide users through the verification link sent to their registered email address.

documents.title: Account Lockout and Password Reset
documents.content: Accounts may be locked after 5 failed login attempts. Password reset requires identity verification via SMS or security questions. Two-factor authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of protection for high-value transactions.

documents.title: Withdrawal and Transaction Limits
documents.content: Unverified accounts have a $500 rolling 30-day sending limit. Verified accounts can send up to $60,000 per transaction. Business accounts have custom limits based on account history and risk profile.

documents.title: Telco Credit Limits and Eligibility
documents.content: Telco Credit limits are based on creditworthiness, ranging from $250 to $10,000. Eligibility requires age 18+, US residency, verified email, and soft credit check. Credit line increases are reviewed every 6 months based on payment history.
documents.legal_context: FCRA compliance required. APR disclosure must be provided before account opening. Equal Credit Opportunity Act applies.

documents.title: Telco Credit Legal Disclosures
documents.content: Telco Credit is issued by Synchrony Bank. Standard APR is variable. Late payment fees apply. Customers must receive Schumer Box disclosure before acceptance. State-specific regulations may apply in CA, NY, and TX.
documents.legal_context: Reg Z (TILA), FCRA, state usury laws. Mandatory disclosure before credit extension.

documents.title: Telco Debit Card Activation
documents.content: Telco Debit Card can be activated via mobile app or by calling the number on the card sticker. PIN setup is required for ATM withdrawals. Daily ATM limit is $400; purchase limit is $3,000.

documents.title: Telco Checkout Integration Guide
documents.content: Telco Checkout supports Smart Payment Buttons, hosted fields, and Braintree SDK. Integration requires REST API credentials and webhook configuration. Average checkout completion time is 12 seconds with One Touch enabled.

documents.title: PCI DSS Compliance Requirements
documents.content: Telco maintains PCI DSS Level 1 certification. Merchants using Telco hosted checkout inherit SAQ A eligibility. Cardholder data must never be stored on regions servers. Quarterly vulnerability scans required for Level 2+ regions.
documents.legal_context: PCI DSS v4.0. Mandatory 92-day log retention for cardholder data environments.

documents.title: KYC and AML Verification
documents.content: Know Your Customer verification requires government-issued ID and proof of address. Anti-Money Laundering monitoring flags transactions over $10,000 and unusual patterns. Enhanced due diligence applies to high-risk jurisdictions.
documents.legal_context: Bank Secrecy Act, USA PATRIOT Act, FinCEN regulations.

documents.title: EU GDPR and Regional Regulations
documents.content: EU customers have right to data portability and erasure under GDPR. PSD2 requires Strong Customer Authentication for online payments. UK FCA regulations apply post-Brexit. Data residency requirements vary by region.
documents.legal_context: GDPR Article 17 (right to erasure), PSD2 SCA requirements.

documents.title: Business Account Multi-User Management
documents.content: Business accounts support role-based access for up to 200 users. Roles include Admin, Finance, Developer, and Customer Support. Activity logs track all user actions for audit compliance.

documents.title: iPhone 18 Pro Activation Stuck on "It may take a few minutes"
documents.content: During iPhone 18 Pro launch windows, activation may queue behind provisioning bursts. Verify eSIM is selected, ensure Wi‑Fi or cellular data is stable, and retry after 15 minutes. Enterprise customers with MDM should confirm DEP assignment propagated. Escalate if ICCID shows profile download failed for more than 30 minutes.

documents.title: Transfer eSIM from Old iPhone to iPhone 18 Pro
documents.content: Use Quick Transfer during setup or scan QR from My Account. Number port during launch weekend may take 2–4 hours. Do not remove old eSIM until new line shows Active in account portal.

documents.title: iPhone 18 Launch Trade-In and Upgrade Program
documents.content: Launch trade-in credits apply to iPhone 18, 18 Pro, and Pro Max through Oct 31. Ship old device within 30 days. In-store trade-in queues are prioritized for pre-order pickup appointments.

documents.title: iPhone 18 Pro Pre-Order Pickup and Store Appointment
documents.content: Launch day pickup requires QR code from order confirmation and government ID matching account holder. Appointments are 15-minute windows. Inventory is reserved until end of appointment day.
